title: Question About Red Notifications Dot Disappearing When Opening List

posts.author: lisaf (Lisa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m wondering if there’s a way to keep the red dot notifications alert in place if there are still unread notifications in my list.

Let’s say I log in and Monday shows I have 6 notifications. I click it and read 2 from the list. I still have 4 unread notifications but the red alert dot is no longer there. I would like something like how the badge shows on my phone apps, alerting to what’s pending but counting down if I don’t read/access all.

Is there a way to do this? Often times I read an alert and act on that particular thing. I’d like the red dot to still be there showing that there are still other notifications unread but now I have to remember to go back manually. Would be great to have that visual cue remain on screen to show there are still messages that have not been viewed.

Thanks!
